replies.msg:
ios:
開surfshark app, setting > protocol > openvpn (udp)

quote.msg: same 呢排surfshark唔知做咩好慢
上面有巴打講udp, 不妨試下，我見真係快左
咩叫udp?

replies.msg:
surfshark 個app 有得揀你個vpn 係用咩network protocol 做data transmission
建議你揀openvpn udp 因為udp 理論上係connectionless 唔洗同個vpn server 做handshaking
啲packet 收到就收到 收唔到就再send 過 唔需要理個connection
有錯勿屌 剩係識少少networking knowledge

surfshark 個app 有得揀你個vpn 係用咩network protocol 做data transmission
建議你揀openvpn udp 因為udp 理論上係connectionless 唔洗同個vpn server 做handshaking
啲packet 收到就收到 收唔到就再send 過 唔需要理個connection
有錯勿屌 剩係識少少networking knowledge

replies.msg: 咁安全性係冇分別？

quote.msg: 咩叫udp?

surfshark 個app 有得揀你個vpn 係用咩network protocol 做data transmission
建議你揀openvpn udp 因為udp 理論上係connectionless 唔洗同個vpn server 做handshaking

replies.msg:
ikev2 cons:
Potentially compromised by the NSA. It uses the Diffie Hellman process to securely exchange public keys needed to encrypt your traffic. Edward Snowden has previous revealed that the NSA may have discovered a way to break this procedure. These claims haven’t been confirmed, but diligent programmers, including NordVPN, have patched up the issue.

openvpn cons:

Complex setup. Its versatility means that most users may be paralyzed by choice and complexity if they try to set up their own OpenVPN.

咁既然surfshark handle 左complex setup, 理論上openvpn 好似係好啲

source:
https://nordvpn.com/zh-tw/blog/protocols/

replies.msg:
network protocol 即係網絡協定
簡單黎講 你當係一種網絡通訊standard就可以.

唔同既protocol 有唔同功能 同埋安全性
例如平時上網會見到http, https
Windows Remote Desktop 既RDP 等等

而vpn通常見到既protocol 有
IPSec
OpenVPN
L2TP
PPTP
ikev2
etc...
